query: double exposure photograph overlapping ghostly silhouette portrait
message: anti-aesthetic / clarity_and_focus / double_exposure: ghostly overlapping portraits, multi-exposure

response.objective_caption: A doll or puppet head with fibrous pigtails is centered against a bright white background. The face appears as a dark silhouette with only faint eye shapes visible, and textured material extends from either side of the head. A thin rectangular border surrounds the image.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A doll head with fibrous pigtails is rendered as a suffocating near-silhouette against a glaring white background, its face obliterated by extreme underexposure and oppressive low contrast. Facial features dissolve into an ambiguous dark mass with almost no surviving detail, creating a heavy, unsettling atmosphere of atmospheric distress.
